title: Þórólfsfell
summary: Þórólfsfell (Icelandic pronunciation: [ˈθouːroul(f)sˌfɛtl̥] ) is a basaltic tuya in southern Iceland, east of Fljótshlíð. The upper section is made up of pillow lavas and is 574 metres above sea level.
text: Þórólfsfell (Icelandic pronunciation: [ˈθouːroul(f)sˌfɛtl̥] ) is a basaltic tuya in southern Iceland, east of Fljótshlíð. The upper section is made up of pillow lavas and is 574 metres above sea level.
